VAL-CLI-002.title: totus auth login saves API key

steps.action: Pipe invalid key format to auth login
steps.expected: Rejects invalid format with error message
steps.observed: Correctly rejected: 'Invalid API key format' with exit code 2

steps.action: Pipe valid API key (tot_live_Nbt1Dqpq_...) to auth login --server-url http://localhost:3000/api
steps.expected: Validates format, verifies with server, saves to config
steps.observed: Format validation passed, but server validation failed with 'Not found: User not found' (exit code 1). Key NOT saved to config.

evidence.terminalOutput: echo 'tot_live_Nbt1Dqpq_...' | bun run packages/cli/src/index.ts auth login -> '✗ Error: Not found: User not found' (exit 1)
evidence.formatValidation: Invalid key correctly rejected with exit code 2 and helpful error message
evidence.otherEndpointsWork: Same key works with /api/shares (200), /api/audit (200) — proving key is valid

VAL-CLI-002.issues: auth login validates by calling /api/user/profile, which has a known bug: profile route uses getRequestContext() instead of getResolvedContext(), resulting in user_id='__api_key_pending__' and 404. Format validation and key prompting work correctly, but the command cannot complete successfully due to the profile endpoint bug.

VAL-CLI-003.title: totus auth status shows auth state

steps.action: Set api_key in config manually, run auth status --server-url http://localhost:3000/api
steps.expected: Shows authenticated state, masked key, source, server URL
steps.observed:
Output: '✓ Authenticated
  Key: tot_live_...Nbt1Dqpq
  Source: config file (...)
  Server: http://localhost:3000/api
  ⚠ Could not verify key with server' — exit code 0

steps.action: Remove api_key from config, run auth status
steps.observed: Output: '✗ Not authenticated\n  Run "totus auth login" to authenticate, or set TOTUS_API_KEY environment variable.' — exit code 2

steps.action: Run auth status with TOTUS_API_KEY env var

evidence.authenticatedOutput: ✓ Authenticated | Key: tot_live_...Nbt1Dqpq | Source: config file | Server: http://localhost:3000/api

steps.action: With api_key in config, run auth logout
steps.expected: Removes api_key from config, shows confirmation
steps.observed: Output: '✓ API key removed from config\n  Config: /Users/weseklund/.config/totus/config.json' — exit code 0

steps.action: Store primary key (mock_ut_cli_1_test_com) in config, run shares list with --api-key secondary key (mock_test_totus_dev)
steps.expected: Returns data for secondary key's user, not stored key's user
steps.observed: shares list --api-key <secondary> returned 4 shares (E2E Test Share, Revoke Test Share, etc.) belonging to mock_test_totus_dev

steps.action: Run shares list with stored key (no override)
steps.expected: Returns data for primary key's user (which has no shares)
steps.observed: shares list returned {"shares": []} — 0 shares for mock_ut_cli_1_test_com

steps.expected: Returns audit events for overridden user
steps.observed: audit list --api-key <secondary> returned events with event_type 'data.viewed' — exit code 0

evidence.flagOverrideShares: 4 shares returned (mock_test_totus_dev's data) vs 0 shares with stored key
evidence.flagOverrideAudit: audit list returned events — exit code 0

steps.action: Run shares list with TOTUS_API_KEY=<secondary key>
steps.expected: Returns data for env var key's user
steps.observed: TOTUS_API_KEY=<secondary> shares list returned 4 shares (same as mock_test_totus_dev) — exit code 0

steps.action: Run audit list with TOTUS_API_KEY=<secondary key>
steps.expected: Returns audit events for env var key's user
steps.observed: audit list returned events — exit code 0

steps.action: Verify auth status with TOTUS_API_KEY set

evidence.envVarShares: 4 shares returned (mock_test_totus_dev's data) — same result as --api-key flag
evidence.envVarAudit: audit list returned events — exit code 0

VAL-CLI-027.title: totus auth token prints masked key

steps.action: With api_key in config, run auth token
steps.observed: Output: 'tot_live_...Nbt1Dqpq\n  Source: config file (...)' — exit code 0

evidence.maskedOutput: tot_live_...Nbt1Dqpq — shows prefix and short token only, long token masked

steps.action: Delete config file, run config set to trigger writeConfig (fresh file creation)
steps.observed: stat shows mode 600 on freshly created config file
writeConfig calls fs.writeFileSync with { mode: 0o600 }, ensureConfigDir creates dir with 0o700

steps.action: Check permissions after auth logout (another writeConfig call)

evidence.caveat: Note: fs.writeFileSync mode only applies on file creation. Overwriting an existing file does not reset permissions. Tested: chmod 644 then config set -> stays 644. This is a Node.js limitation, not a CLI bug.

frictions.description: auth login validates API key by calling /api/user/profile, which has a known bug (returns 404 'User not found' for API key auth due to getRequestContext() vs getResolvedContext()). This prevents auth login from completing, even with a valid API key.
frictions.resolution: Manually wrote config file to test other auth assertions. This is a known issue documented in AGENTS.md.

frictions.description: auth status shows '⚠ Could not verify key with server' because it also calls /api/user/profile for display name. The status command still works (shows auth state, key, source) but cannot show user display name.
frictions.resolution: The command handles the profile error gracefully and still shows all other information.

frictions.description: Node.js fs.writeFileSync mode option only applies on file creation, not when overwriting. If config file already exists with wrong permissions (e.g., 644), writeConfig does not fix them. The CLI warns about insecure permissions but doesn't correct them.
frictions.resolution: Code correctly creates files with 0600 but could add explicit chmod after write for existing files.

summary: Tested 7 assertions: 6 passed, 1 failed. VAL-CLI-002 (auth login) fails because it validates the key against /api/user/profile which has a known bug returning 404 for API-key-authenticated requests. All other auth/config assertions pass: auth status correctly shows auth state with multiple key sources, auth logout cleanly removes the key, --api-key flag and TOTUS_API_KEY env var both override stored key (verified with different users' data), auth token prints masked key, and config file gets 0600 permissions on creation.
